commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

commit.message:
Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix export dedup: recompute counts/dates from merged events

When contacts are merged during dedup, the 'winner' contact may have
zero counts while the merged-away duplicate had the actual data.
After merging events, recompute counts and dates from the event list
so merged contacts show accurate data.

feat: add mobile-responsive layout with scroll position management

Layout changes:
- Desktop: unchanged two-panel side-by-side layout
- Mobile: panels stack vertically (inputs on top, results below)
- .shell switches from fixed height: 100dvh to min-height: 100dvh on
  mobile, releasing the overflow constraints that kept each panel in its
  own independent scroll zone; the whole page scrolls as one on mobile
- InputPanel becomes full-width with auto height on mobile; right border
  replaced with a bottom border separating it from the results

Results panel:
- .overview-stats gains flex-wrap: wrap so stat blocks wrap on narrow
  screens rather than overflowing
- Padding reduced from 1.5rem to 1rem on mobile

Scroll management:
- Updated scroll save/restore to detect whether .results-area is the
  active scroll container (desktop) or the window is (mobile), using a
  scrollHeight > clientHeight check rather than a viewport-width check
- When entering a simulation detail on mobile, scrolls to the offsetTop
  of .results-area rather than 0, so the view lands at the top of the
  results rather than the top of the input panel above it
- Scroll-to-results-top and restore-on-back both work correctly on
  desktop and mobile

Copy:
- Welcome banner updated from "input panel on the left" to "input panel"
  since on mobile it sits above rather than to the left of the results

commit.message:
feat(gsm): add overnight stays detection (nocowanie poza domem)

Detect nights spent away from home by comparing the last activity of
each day with the first activity of the next day. If both occur at a
location different from the home BTS (most frequent location), an
overnight stay is recorded. Consecutive nights are grouped into stays.

New section rendered in analysis after Anomalies showing:
- Home location identified from billing data
- Each stay with period, night count, locations, and details

- Fixes "route already been assigned name admin.levelmanagement" error
- Application will run without route caching

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

FIFO boundary tests, VCD auto-discovery, and Shrike FPGA GCD target (#7)

* analyze_vcd: auto-discover all DUTs from sim_build/*/dump.vcd

Remove hardcoded DUTS list; add discover_duts() that globs for all
dump.vcd files under sim_build/. main() now prints all 9 DUTs instead
of just fifo and moore_array.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add empty/fill-drain FIFO tests and throughput stats

- test_fifo_empty: drives out_r=1 for 200 cycles with no input to verify
  no spurious output; uses waves=False to avoid VCD ordering dependency
- test_fifo_fill_drain: floods FIFO then drains to verify no drops
- HandshakeStats.compute() now takes total_cycles and reports throughput,
  inp/out utilization, min/mean/p95 latency alongside existing fields
- README and CLAUDE.md updated with GCD and FIFO run instructions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fpga/shrike/gcd: UART-based GCD for Vicharak Shrike (SLG47910V)

Add uart_rx.v, uart_tx.v, gcd_top.v, and README.md under
fpga/shrike/gcd/. The top-level FSM receives two bytes over 9600-baud
UART, zero-extends them to 12 bits, drives the existing gcd.v core,
and returns the 1-byte result. Power-on reset is generated internally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gcd: replace modulo with subtraction-based Euclidean algorithm

Removes the % operator so the design synthesizes cleanly on tools
(e.g. Go Configure / SLG47910V) that do not support hardware modulo.
Correctness is unchanged; gcd(0,b)=b and gcd(a,0)=a are now explicit
base cases. Tests still pass since cocotb waits for the done signal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gcd: raise compute_gcd timeout to 5000 cycles

Subtraction-based GCD needs up to ~max(a,b)/gcd(a,b) steps.
The worst 12-bit case (e.g. gcd(4094,4093)=1) needs ~4093 cycles,
well over the old 200-cycle limit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* CLAUDE.md: remove completed future-work items

commit.message:
security: comprehensive hardening — 20 vulnerability fixes

CRITICAL:
- Add rate limits to chat/AI endpoints (prevents API cost abuse)
- Fix X-Forwarded-For spoofing that bypassed all rate limits
- Require current password for password changes (prevent account takeover)

HIGH:
- Block infinite trial re-registration (check billing_trial_ends)
- Fix stored XSS via church/reseller names in HTML templates (escapeHtml)
- Remove reseller password dual-write to legacy column
- Block deactivated resellers in requireReseller middleware
- Require Telegram webhook secret in production

MEDIUM:
- Use constant-time comparison for chat proxy secret
- Validate Slack webhook URLs against SSRF (hooks.slack.com only)
- Check default credential values (not just existence) in production
- Add SESSION_SECRET production warning
- Add WebSocket/SSE connection limits (per-IP + global caps)
- Replace raw e.message with safeErrorMessage in error responses
- Fix referral credit to flat $49 (was tier-based, up to $499)
- Defer billing tier downgrade to webhook (prevent local/Stripe desync)
- Change admin cookie SameSite from Lax to Strict
- Add church email uniqueness check on profile update
- Rate limit billing upgrade/downgrade/reactivate endpoints

LOW:
- Add chat message length validation (2000 char cap)
- Mask tokens in log output (guest TD tokens)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Publish: The Fix Survives

On the asymmetry between fixes and diagnostics — why the code survives
context loss but the reasoning that produced it doesn't, and what it
takes to encode the diagnostic rather than just the fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix ChromaDB/pydantic v1 error and implement Phase 4: Content Pipeline + Polish

Fix the pydantic.v1.errors.ConfigError by catching all exceptions (not just
ImportError) on chromadb import and making VectorStore init lazy. Also fix
documents/__init__.py to use lazy module-level imports, and fix error handlers
in app.py to return JSONResponse instead of plain dicts.

Phase 4 features:
- Content pipeline (generate_blog_post, generate_show_notes, generate_social_clips)
  via OpenAI from episode transcripts, with in-memory caching
- Content pipeline API routes (POST /api/episodes/{id}/blog-post, show-notes,
  social-clips; GET /api/episodes/{id}/content/{type})
- Content Pipeline UI in Control Room with episode selector, generate buttons,
  copy-to-clipboard, and markdown export
- Recording stubs (start/stop recording API + UI) for LiveKit Egress
- Studio view polish: real audio visualizer (Web Audio API waveform), screen
  sharing button, connection quality indicator, smooth participant tile
  fade-in/fade-out transitions
- 12 new content pipeline unit tests + 7 new integration tests (54 total, all pass)

Auto-generate mstrings.h in Visual Studio build.

langcomp.vcxproj now runs itself after build to regenerate mstrings.h
and strings.xl from strings.txt, with Inputs/Outputs for incremental
checking.  UpToDateCheckInput/Output items tell the VS IDE to consider
strings.txt a project input so it triggers a rebuild when changed.

clans.sln adds langcomp as a ProjectDependency of clans, config,
pcedit, reset, and qtest so they never compile before mstrings.h exists.

commit.message:
Scope newsletter API to /newsletter base path on api.micahwalter.com (#28)

Adds ApiMappingKey: newsletter to NewsletterApiMapping so routes live at
api.micahwalter.com/newsletter/* instead of the domain root. This frees
the root for future APIs (images, photos, etc.) to each claim their own
base path under the shared api-domain stack.

API GW V2 strips the base path before forwarding, so Lambda routes
(/subscribe, /confirm, /unsubscribe) are unaffected.

Closes #27

commit.message:
feat: transfer uploaded attachments to Runner sandbox for AI reading

Files uploaded by users were saved to the server's sandbox but never
included in the encrypted task blob, so the Runner's AI CLI couldn't
access them. Now base64-encode attachments into the blob on the server
side and write them to disk on the Runner side before task execution.
